SEARCH
Package Cataphract.Core

Class Loader

java.lang.Object
Cataphract.Core.Loader
public class Loader extends Object
Entry point to the kernel loader. Checks conditions and loads the kernel.
Since:
0.0.1 (Zen Quantum 1.0)
Version:
1.44.7 (11-October-2023, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    abraxisFilePathList
    A list of kernel file paths used by Abraxis subsystem to verify kernel integrity
    private Console
    console
    Instantiate Console to get user inputs

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private byte
    abraxisLogic()
    Logic of the Abraxis sub-system to check if kernel programs are verified and can be booted without issues.

    Logic to check the file hashes against the M1 manifest hashes.

    Logic to check the file sizes against the Manifest M2 sizes

    Logic to convert from an OS dependent file separator format of file paths to Nion File Separator format.

    fileIgnoreList(String fileName)
    Logic to ignore certain files and directories who's value may or may not change over time.
    private String
    guestShell()
    Logic to provide the user with a guest shell: a shell with limited functionality to be used before login

    Logic that will load the kernel after checking the kernel integrity

    The entry point to the loader.

  • Field Details

    • abraxisFilePathList

      private static List<String> abraxisFilePathList
      A list of kernel file paths used by Abraxis subsystem to verify kernel integrity

    • console

      private Console console
      Instantiate Console to get user inputs

  • Constructor Details

    • Loader

      public Loader()
      Sole constructor. (For invocation by subclass constructors, typically implicit.)

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
      The entry point to the loader. Boots the kernel based on the arguments supplied.
      Parameters:
      args - Parameters passed to the loader, specifying the kernel modes.
      Throws:
      Exception - Throws any exceptions encountered during runtime.

    • loaderLogic

      private void loaderLogic() throws Exception
      Logic that will load the kernel after checking the kernel integrity
      Throws:
      Exception

    • abraxisLogic

      private byte abraxisLogic()
      Logic of the Abraxis sub-system to check if kernel programs are verified and can be booted without issues.
      Returns:
      byte abraxisResult - Returns the results of the integrity checks.

    • manifestFilesCheck

      private boolean manifestFilesCheck()
      Logic to check if the Manifest files exists in the manifest directory.
      Returns:
      boolean - Returns if the M1 and M2 manifest files exist

    • populateKernelFiles

      private boolean populateKernelFiles(File fileDirectory)
      Logic to populate the Kernel files into a list
      Parameters:
      fileDirectory - The directory to check for sub-directories and files to be added to the list
      Returns:
      boolean status - The status of populating the directories

    • fileIgnoreList

      private boolean fileIgnoreList(String fileName)
      Logic to ignore certain files and directories who's value may or may not change over time. These may be external libraries, JREs, manifest files, the System and User directories.
      Parameters:
      fileName - Name of the file to be checked against the ignore list.
      Returns:
      boolean status - Returns the value, whether the file needs to be ignored or not

    • checkFileHashes

      private boolean checkFileHashes()
      Logic to check the file hashes against the M1 manifest hashes.
      Returns:
      boolean kernelIntegrity - Returns if the file hashes match or not against the M1 manifest.

    • checkFileSizes

      private boolean checkFileSizes()
      Logic to check the file sizes against the Manifest M2 sizes
      Returns:
      boolean status - Returns if the file sizes match or not against the M2 manifest.

    • setupStatusCheck

      private boolean setupStatusCheck()
      Logic to check if Cataphract has been setup on the system.
      Returns:
      boolean - Returns if the "System" and "User" directories have been initialized

    • convertToNionSeparator

      private String convertToNionSeparator(String filePath)
      Logic to convert from an OS dependent file separator format of file paths to Nion File Separator format.
      Parameters:
      filePath - String that contains the file path in OS dependent file separator format.
      Returns:
      String - The value of the String converted to Nion File Separator format.

    • guestShell

      private String guestShell()
      Logic to provide the user with a guest shell: a shell with limited functionality to be used before login
